rationale: No conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §29.366, which governs comptroller referral of fraud to district attorneys in an educational assistance program.
quote: If the comptroller obtains evidence of fraudulent use of an account or money distributed under the program or any other violation of law by a certified educational assistance organization, education service provider or vendor of educational products, or program participant, the comptroller shall notify the appropriate local county or district attorney
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed change and this rule.
